descriptions.chatgpt: OpenAI’s chat assistant for writing, coding, analysis, and more.
descriptions.claude: Anthropic’s assistant, great at long-form reading, writing, and coding.
descriptions.gemini: Google’s AI assistant, tightly integrated with the Google ecosystem.
descriptions.grok: xAI’s assistant with access to real-time X/Twitter context.
descriptions.kimi: Long-context assistant with strong file reading and summarization.
descriptions.doubao: ByteDance’s multimodal assistant for chat, writing, and images.
descriptions.wenxin: Baidu’s assistant focused on Chinese understanding and creation.
descriptions.tongyi: Alibaba’s assistant supporting multiple languages and tasks.
descriptions.perplexity: AI-powered search with real-time answers and citations.
descriptions.you: AI search engine combining web search with chat.
descriptions.midjourney: Top-tier image generator known for distinctive artistic styles.
descriptions.dalle3: OpenAI image model (often used via ChatGPT Plus) for high-quality generations.
descriptions.stable-diffusion: Open-source image model you can run locally for free.
descriptions.ideogram: Image generator especially good at rendering text in images.
descriptions.flux: High-quality open model family from Black Forest Labs for image generation.
descriptions.runway: AI video creation and editing: text-to-video, image-to-video, and more.
descriptions.sora: OpenAI’s text-to-video model with very high output quality.
descriptions.kling: Kuaishou’s video generator with solid Chinese prompt support.
descriptions.hailuo: MiniMax’s AI video tool with strong visual results.
descriptions.github-copilot: AI coding assistant from GitHub/OpenAI across major IDEs.
descriptions.cursor: AI-first code editor with chat-driven coding workflows.
descriptions.windsurf: Codeium’s AI code editor with strong free features.
descriptions.v0: Vercel’s UI/code generator that outputs React components.
descriptions.bolt: In-browser AI full-stack builder that generates runnable apps quickly.
descriptions.notion-ai: AI inside Notion for writing, summarizing, and translation.
descriptions.gamma: AI slide/deck generator for creating polished presentations fast.
descriptions.beautiful-ai: Presentation builder that auto-beautifies layouts with AI assistance.
descriptions.tome: AI presentation tool that generates structure, content, and shareable decks from prompts.
descriptions.pitch: Collaborative presentation tool with templates and reusable content blocks for teams.
descriptions.decktopus: AI-assisted slide maker that drafts outlines, slide copy, and asset suggestions.
descriptions.slidesai: Turn text into slides quickly—great for converting notes/articles into decks.
descriptions.plus-ai: AI for Google Slides/PowerPoint: generate slides from prompts or docs.
descriptions.prezi: Zooming-canvas presentations for story-like, dynamic walkthroughs with collaboration.
descriptions.slidebean: Startup-focused pitch deck builder with content structure and auto layout.
descriptions.presentations-ai: AI deck generator that creates copy + visual style with fast editing.
descriptions.otter-ai: Meeting transcription and notes with automatic summaries.
descriptions.fireflies: AI meeting assistant for recording, transcription, and insights.
descriptions.elevenlabs: Best-in-class voice synthesis with cloning and multilingual voices.
descriptions.suno: Generate full songs from lyrics and style prompts.
descriptions.udio: High-quality music generation across multiple styles.
descriptions.whisper: OpenAI’s open-source speech-to-text model for multilingual transcription.
descriptions.canva-ai: Design platform with AI features: generation, background removal, magic edits.
descriptions.adobe-firefly: Adobe’s generative AI suite integrated with Creative Cloud apps.
descriptions.remove-bg: One-click background removal powered by AI.
descriptions.grammarly: English writing assistant for grammar, clarity, and style improvements.
descriptions.jasper: Marketing copy generator with brand voice and multi-format content.
descriptions.copy-ai: Generate marketing copy, blogs, and social content quickly.
descriptions.deepl: High-quality machine translation with strong accuracy.
descriptions.heygen: AI avatar video generator with lip-sync and voice options.
descriptions.descript: Edit podcasts/videos like docs with transcription-driven workflows.
descriptions.luma: Luma’s video generation tool for high-quality AI clips.
descriptions.character-ai: Roleplay chat platform with a wide variety of AI characters.
descriptions.poe: One hub to chat with multiple models (Claude, GPT, Gemini, etc.).
descriptions.leonardo: Creative image generation for game assets and design with daily free credits.
descriptions.replicate: Run AI models in the cloud with pay-as-you-go pricing.
descriptions.huggingface: The core hub for open models, datasets, and AI tooling.
descriptions.coze: No-code platform to build AI bots/apps with workflows and integrations.
descriptions.deepseek: Chat model with strong reasoning and coding, great Chinese experience.
descriptions.mistral-le-chat: Mistral’s chat assistant with multi-model chat and doc/code help.
descriptions.groq: Ultra-low-latency inference platform with developer APIs for real-time apps.
descriptions.openrouter: Unified API gateway to many models with routing and flexible billing.
descriptions.langchain: Framework for building LLM apps: agents, RAG, tools, and integrations.
descriptions.llamaindex: Data/RAG framework to connect your docs and build retrieval assistants.
descriptions.dify: Open-source platform for LLM apps and workflows, with agent and RAG builders.
descriptions.flowise: Open-source visual builder for LLM apps/agents with drag-and-drop flows.
descriptions.codeium: AI coding assistant with autocomplete + chat across multiple IDEs.
descriptions.tabnine: Enterprise-focused coding assistant emphasizing privacy and control.
descriptions.continue: Open-source coding assistant for VS Code/JetBrains with multi-model support.
descriptions.aider: Terminal pair-programming tool that edits existing repos and integrates with git.
descriptions.krea: Creative suite for real-time image generation, enhancement, and editing.
descriptions.clipdrop: All-in-one image toolkit: cleanup, inpainting, upscaling, relighting, and more.
descriptions.recraft: Design-focused generator for high-quality images and vector assets.
descriptions.photoroom: E-commerce photo editor: backgrounds, product scenes, and batch processing.
